bandInfo.name: Warfarin
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Intensive Monitoring] When the battle starts, +2 Alliance Stacks to 1 random Operator of each different Tier on the field

bandInfo.name: Amiya
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Wills As One] When there are 3/4/5 different active Alliances, all Operators +20/30/40% ATK and HP respectively

bandInfo.name: Du Yaoye
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Heroes All Around] The first two manual refreshes in every round become a special refresh: This refresh will prioritize offering 1 Yan Operator Strategy may be flawed when some [Yan] Operators are missing

bandInfo.name: Goliath
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Indestructible] Start with 45 Life Points

bandInfo.name: Orchid
bandInfo.effectDesc: [HR Consultant] Every manual refresh becomes a special refresh: 2 copies of the same Operator will appear with one Frozen; obtain 1 Dispatch Module on Round 10

bandInfo.name: Justin Fitzroy Jr.
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Private Equity Fund] Upon entering Rest Phase on Rounds 1, 4, 7, 10, obtain 1 Knight's Donation Box: Destroyed when equipped and grants 1-6 Funds

bandInfo.name: Ermengarde
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Phylactery Secret] First 2 Operators defeated in battle will be revived immediately!

bandInfo.name: Lee
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Idle Teatime] Funds from Rounds 1 and 2 are temporarily held and released on Round 3; randomly obtain 1 Tier 2 Operator and 1 Tier 4 Operator during Round 3's Rest Phase

bandInfo.name: Kirara
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Completion Reward] For every 20 Funds spent, gain a random Operator from a Tier not exceeding the current Dispatch Center Level

bandInfo.name: Pepe
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Erudite and Versatile] When Dispatch Center reaches Lv. 2, 4, and 6, obtain 1 special refresh: this refresh will prioritize offering Operators Strategy may be flawed when some [Sargon] Operators are missing

bandInfo.name: Harold
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Talent Blind Box] Starting from Round 4, obtain 1 [Victoria] Operator every 2 rounds Strategy may be flawed when some [Victoria] Operators are missing

bandInfo.name: Sciurus
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Snowfield's Gift] The first Operator purchased every round costs 1 Funds Strategy may be flawed when some [Kjerag] Operators are missing

bandInfo.name: Panganini
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Customized Firearm] After spending a total of 55 Funds, obtain 1 Tier 4 or above Elite Laterano Operator Strategy may be flawed when some [Laterano] Operators are missing

bandInfo.name: Clementia
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Noble Sacrifice] When an <Ægir> Operator is defeated, grants Ægir Alliance stacks equivalent to that Operator's Tier Strategy may be flawed when some [Ægir] Operators are missing

bandInfo.name: Emperor
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Express Dispatch] All allied Operators -50% Redeployment Time

bandInfo.name: Mulberry
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Experimental Med. Sticks] When the battle begins, all allied Operators in the rightmost column of the field gain the following effect: Every attack has a 20% chance to grant 1 Shield (max 1 stack)

bandInfo.name: Humus
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Recycling] When a Ground Operator's skill ends, they grant 3 SP to 1 random Operator in the adjacent 4 tiles

bandInfo.name: Quintus
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Unstable Element] In Round 3, obtain special equipment Mutated Cells: After the battle ends, equipped Operator changes to a random Operator 1 Tier higher (up to Tier 6)

bandInfo.name: Yu
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Slow Simmer] When Round 8 begins, if there is only 1 active Alliance, +36zzzz stacks to it; otherwise +12 stacks to all active Alliances

bandInfo.name: Dobermann
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Extra Training!] Obtain 1 'Pointing Stick' special Arts every 2 rounds: When used, adds extra enemies to the field and grants extra funds if the battle is perfectly cleared on your own

bandInfo.name: Catherine
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Targeted Drop] Whenever the Dispatch Center is upgraded, the shop offers 1 free Equipment with 3 options to choose from

bandInfo.name: Malkiewicz
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Commercial Packaging] Start with 1 Commercial Packaging Plan: For every 7 Operators sold, obtain 1 copy of the equipped Operator

bandInfo.name: Qalaiša
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Scavenger Butterfly] When an allied Operator is defeated, other allied units on the field gain +20% ATK (Max 200%, and lasts until Operators are defeated or the battle ends)

bandInfo.name: Ch'en
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Personal Power] All Operators deal Weakness damage (When dealing Physical or Arts damage, change damage type depending on the target's DEF and RES)

bandInfo.name: Damazti Cluster
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Damazti Isomorphism] In Round 5, obtain Damazti Isomorph: When equipped together with certain other equipment, the equipped Operator is treated as a member of a specific Alliance

bandInfo.name: Pith
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Top Student] In Round 1, gain 1 special Operator that can deal Nervous Impairment, Burn, or Necrosis. This Operator also belongs to the Harmony Alliance: +1 Operator count to some Alliances

bandInfo.name: Dusk
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Painted into Reality] In Round 1, obtain Special Arts Dusk's Scroll: On use, can copy 1 Operator within use range (Includes that Operator's Elite status and carried Equipment)

bandInfo.name: Cannot
bandInfo.effectDesc: [Compound Interest] Leftover Funds can be saved for the next round. When there are at least 5 Funds left, gain 1 extra Funds per round

bandInfo.name: Duck Lord
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Mystery Customer'] From Round 5 onwards, some enemies you and your teammates encounter may be replaced with <Duck Lord>, <Gopnik>, <Crying Thief>, or <Fatty>. Defeating them (even during Unite Phases) will grant 1 Funds

bandInfo.name: Shamare
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Voodoo Doll'] The first time you sell an Operator each round, exchange them for a random Operator instead.

bandInfo.name: Ioleta Russell
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Command and Order']

bandInfo.name: Matsukiri
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Well-connected'] When entering Rest Phase in even-numbered rounds, randomly receive an Operator from the Dispatch Center

bandInfo.name: Młynar
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Business Metrics'] For every [Kazimierz] Operator purchased, gain 1 extra Fund next round (up to 3 each round)

bandInfo.name: Chiave
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Gang Action'] After actively refreshing the Dispatch Center 6 times, obtain 1 random [Siracusa] Operator (up to 2 each round)

bandInfo.name: Narantuya
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Everyone Gets Their Cut'] When entering Rest Phase in even-numbered rounds, a special refresh occurs, offering a choice between 2 free equipments The Sargon Alliance <With 6 different [Sargon] Operators on field> will be replaced with "When [Sargon] Operators activate their skills, Operators within the surrounding 8 tiles also gain the effects of that Operator's equipments (up to Tier V), lasting for 60 seconds."

bandInfo.name: Touch
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Field Medic'] One Reserve Operator - Medic will appear on the field for every players; at the start of combat, if there are 2 upgraded Operators, Touch will appear instead.

bandInfo.name: Suzuran
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Protective Power'] At the start of each round, trigger the <When obtained> effect of one Operator on field (Prioritizes Operators deployed on upper right tiles)

bandInfo.name: Jessica
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Rendezvous Orders'] Upon entering Rest Phase on Rounds 4, 7, 10 and 13, obtain 1 Dispatch Module

bandInfo.name: Muelsyse
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Pure Drop'] At the start of round 1, obtain 1 upgraded Doctor Hologram

bandInfo.name: Fang
bandInfo.effectDesc: ['Teamwork'] Upon entering Rest Phase on Rounds 8, 10, 12 and 14, obtain 1 Transmitter
